title: Piers Morgan wife Celia Walden sleep remark resurfaces again as HSTikkyTokky interview turns personal on air
summary_full: Piers Morgan walked off his show after a heated clash with Harrison Sullivan turned personal. The situation escalated when Sullivan mentioned Celia Walden, leading to Morgan ending the interview. Soon after, Walden’s old 2021 quote asking for her husband to return to work went viral again, adding another layer to the already widely shared moment.
